title: Modern No Tree Punching
description: A modern texture touch up for No Tree Punching
body: [![Levviata - Levviatas-No-Tree-Punching-Modernized](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=Levviata&message=Levviatas-No-Tree-Punching-Modernized&color=blue&logo=github)](https://github.com/Levviata/Levviatas-No-Tree-Punching-Modernized "Go to GitHub repo") ## No Tree Punching Modernized A resource pack for the [No Tree Punching](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-tree-punching) mod by [Alcatraz Escapee](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/alcatrazescapee/projects) ## Description A retexture of NTP in a "modern" style ## Features Retexture of: - Pickaxes, axes, mattocks, saws, flint tools, clay tool, knives, fire starter - Clay and brick pots (item) - Flint shard, clay brick ## Gallery ### New textures ![New](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/278023ccede82f58c52eeda7eeb0d1504674098b.png) ### Old textures ![Old](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ad0d281ad8e343a6447f5e9fb96f4d5cc4a1ef2.png) ## Credits Stop sign icons created by Freepik - Flaticon ## License All rights deserved. Can be added to modpacks
